intro: Serpocaulon appressum, also known as the 'Velvet Rattlesnake Fern', is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, pain, and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antipyretic properties. The bioactive constituents of Serpocaulon appressum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and polysaccharides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
